app.title: FillMyDoc
app.tagline: Word template + CSV → PDF documents in one click

mapping.title: Variable mapping
mapping.conditions_hint: Map each condition to a CSV column containing true/false, yes/no, or 1/0
mapping.email_hint: CSV column containing each signer's email (for OTP verification)

landing.hero_sub: Word template + CSV → 60 personalized PDF documents in 30 seconds. No errors. No AI hallucinations.
landing.social_proof: Used by marketing, HR, and legal teams
landing.step1_desc: Your Word template with {variables} and your CSV file.
landing.step2_desc: Match each variable to a CSV column. Auto-match included.
landing.step3_desc: A zip with all your personalized PDF documents. In 30 seconds.
landing.usecases_title: For every team that handles documents at scale
landing.usecase2_desc: Offer letters and amendments in batch
landing.usecase4_desc: NDAs and standard contracts at scale
landing.faq1_a: Yes. Files are processed in memory and deleted immediately after generation. Nothing is stored on our servers.
landing.faq2_a: Word files (.docx) with variables in curly braces: {name}, {address}, etc.
landing.faq3_a: Place {variables} in your Word file. Upload a CSV with matching columns. The tool replaces them automatically.
landing.faq4_q: Is the electronic signature legally valid?
landing.faq4_a: Yes. Our e-signature uses email OTP verification, a complete audit trail, and SHA-256 document hashing. It complies with the eIDAS regulation for simple and advanced electronic signatures.
landing.footer_cta_title: Ready to save 2 hours per week?

preview.title: Live preview
preview.configure_mapping: Configure the variable mapping above to see a live preview of your document.

signing.sign_disclaimer: By clicking "Sign", you agree that your name, the date, and your IP address will be added to the document as an electronic signature.
signing.otp_disclaimer: A 6-digit verification code will be sent to your email to authenticate your signature. Compliant with eIDAS regulation.
signing.otp_sent_message: A 6-digit code was sent to {{email}}. Check your inbox.
signing.esign_redirect_message: You will be redirected to the certified signing platform to complete the process.
signing.signed_message: This document was signed by {{name}} on {{date}}.
signing.already_signed: This document has already been signed.
signing.email_send_error: Failed to send email. Please check email configuration.
